match.userMessage:

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH SHORELINE - DAY - Wet sand shoreline at Bondi Beach where waves gently wash over bare feet
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose.
